prerequisites.value: Nerve-Racking Negotiator, Persuasive, Skill Focus ( Intimidate ).

description.value:
**Benefit:** When you successfully use the Intimidate skill to force an opponent to act friendly toward you, the duration of the attitude change lasts 2d6 hours.

**Normal:** Changing an opponent’s attitude with Intimidate

ly changes the foe’s attitude to friendly for 1d6Ã10 minutes.
